name: insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, inaccurate risk assessments cause inadequate coverage recommendations. We provide a streamlined risk assessment tool instead of manual risk assessment methods.
problem_solved: Inaccurate risk assessments lead to inadequate coverage recommendations.
